content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented `ralph pr watch` support around a new mockable PR-watch workflow. The CLI now accepts `pr watch <pr-number> --max-wait <duration> --poll-interval <seconds>`, prints a serialized `WatchOutcome`, and maps watch failures through `AppError`. The new bead workflow module polls PR status, codex bot body reactions, bot line comments since the latest push, known-flake CI failures, one-shot reruns, and squash merge completion through the shared `ProcessPrToolPort` shell-out path. Unit coverage exercises the happy path, in-progress polling, known-flake rerun success, known-flake second failure, non-flake CI block, bot line-comment block, bot rejection, and timeout behavior.","outstanding_risks":["`br lint` could not be run because `br` is not installed in either the plain shell or `nix develop` environment; both attempts failed with command-not-found exit 127.","The working tree contains existing `.beads/issues.jsonl` and untracked `.ralph-burning/projects/itn1-1/`

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn

## Validation Evidence

None provided.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
